  return (
    <>
      <hgroup>
        <Heading as="h1">{t('heading')}</Heading>
        <Paragraph as="h2">{currentAccount?.displayName}</Paragraph>
      </hgroup>
      <Form
        initialValues={initialValues}
        noValidate
        onSubmit={onSubmit}
        schema={schema}
        serverError={error}
      >
        <Flex direction="column" gap={6}>
          <Panel p={6} variant="primary">
            <Flex direction="column" gap={6}>
              <Paragraph>{t('intro')}</Paragraph>
              <Flex direction="column" gap={2}>
                <Paragraph variant="red">{t('einRequired')}</Paragraph>
                <Paragraph variant="dark">
                  <Trans
                    components={[
                      <Link
                        href="https://www.irs.gov/businesses/small-businesses-self-employed/apply-for-an-employer-identification-number-ein-online"
                        isExternal
                        key="obtain-ein-link"
                      />,
                    ]}
                    i18nKey="obtainEin"
                    t={t}
                  />
                </Paragraph>
              </Flex>
              <Flex direction="column" gap={2}>
                <Label variant="bold">{t('legalTaxIdAndName.heading')}</Label>
                <Box>
                  <Flex gap={2}>
                    <FormMaskedInputControl
                      data-analytics-ignore
                      isRequired
                      label={t('legalTaxIdAndName.taxIdLabel')}
                      name="taxid"
                      type="ein"
                    />
                    <FormInputControl
                      autoComplete="off"
                      isRequired
                      label={t('legalTaxIdAndName.legalNameLabel')}
                      name="name"
                      role="presentation"
                    />
                  </Flex>
                  <Meta>{t('legalTaxIdAndName.description')}</Meta>
                </Box>
              </Flex>
              <Box>
                <FormInputControl
                  isRequired
                  label="FEC Committee ID"
                  maxLength={9}
                  name="fecCommitteeId"
                  type="text"
                />
              </Box>
              <Flex direction="column" gap={2}>
                <Label variant="bold">{t('dateEstablished.heading')}</Label>
                <FormDateTimeControl
                  isRequired
                  label={t('dateEstablished.label')}
                  maxDate={today}
                  name="establishedDate"
                />
              </Flex>
              <Flex direction="column" gap={2}>
                <FormTextAreaControl
                  formControlProps={{
                    formLabelProps: { variant: 'bold' },
                  }}
                  formHelperText={t('missionStatement.description')}
                  isRequired
                  label={t('missionStatement.heading')}
                  name="description"
                  variant="outline"
                />
              </Flex>
              <Addresses
                accountSlug={activeAccount?.slug}
                setUseMailingAddress={setUseMailingAddress}
                setUsePhysicalAddress={setUsePhysicalAddress}
              />
            </Flex>
          </Panel>
          <StepFooter isLoading={createAddressIsLoading || updateAddressIsLoading} />
        </Flex>
      </Form>
    </>
  );
}

payload.text:
**Planning addition of hidden subCategoryType field**

I'll plan to add `subCategoryType` as a hidden input by updating the initial values with `currentAccount?.subCategoryType || ''` and adding a hidden FormInputControl to the form. I'll also ensure the schema includes `subCategoryType` as a nullable string to keep validation consistent and that the field is submitted properly with the form data.

summary.text:
**Planning addition of hidden subCategoryType field**

I'll plan to add `subCategoryType` as a hidden input by updating the initial values with `currentAccount?.subCategoryType || ''` and adding a hidden FormInputControl to the form. I'll also ensure the schema includes `subCategoryType` as a nullable string to keep validation consistent and that the field is submitted properly with the form data.

     1	import { TFunction } from 'react-i18next';
     2	import * as yup from 'yup';
     3	import { SUBCATEGORY_TYPES } from '../Category/SubCategoryType/constants';
     4	
     5	const FEDERAL_SUBCATEGORY_TYPES = new Set(SUBCATEGORY_TYPES.federal);
     6	
     7	const FEC_COMMITTEE_ID_REGEX = /^C\d{8}$/;
     8	
     9	const normalizeFecCommitteeId = (value: unknown): string | undefined => {
    10	  if (typeof value !== 'string') {
    11	    return undefined;
    12	  }
    13	
    14	  const sanitized = value.replace(/\s+/g, '').toUpperCase();
    15	
    16	  return sanitized === '' ? undefined : sanitized;
    17	};
    18	
    19	export const getSchema = (t: TFunction<'organizationApplication', 'legalEntity'>) =>
    20	  yup.object().shape({
    21	    city: yup.string().required(),
    22	    country: yup.string().required(),
    23	    description: yup.string().required(t('missionStatement.required')),
    24	    establishedDate: yup.date().required(t('dateEstablished.required')),
    25	    fecCommitteeId: yup
    26	      .string()
    27	      .transform((value) => normalizeFecCommitteeId(value))
    28	      .when('subCategoryType', {
    29	        is: (value: unknown) =>
    30	          typeof value === 'string' &&
    31	          FEDERAL_SUBCATEGORY_TYPES.has(value as typeof SUBCATEGORY_TYPES.federal[number]),
    32	        otherwise: (schema) => schema.notRequired(),

+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+BASE_BRANCH=${1:-main}
+
+if ! git rev-parse --verify "$BASE_BRANCH" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+  echo "Base branch '$BASE_BRANCH' not found." >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+mapfile -t files < <(
+  git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACM "$BASE_BRANCH"...HEAD -- '*.js' '*.jsx' '*.ts' '*.tsx'
+)

+  echo "No changed JS/TS files to lint."
+  exit 0
+fi
+
+echo "Linting ${#files[@]} changed file(s):"
+printf ' - %s\n' "${files[@]}"
+
+yarn eslint "${files[@]}"
*** End Patch

payload.text:
**Rewriting script for zsh and older bash compatibility**

I’m planning to remove `mapfile` from the script since it’s a Bash 4+ feature and breaks on older versions like macOS’s Bash 3.2. Instead, I’ll read the git diff output line-by-line into an array using a `while IFS= read -r` loop. This keeps compatibility with both Bash and zsh, especially considering users might run the script under zsh or source it directly. I want to carefully handle filenames with spaces and ensure the script exits gracefully if no files are found before running eslint.

summary.text:
**Rewriting script for zsh and older bash compatibility**

I’m planning to remove `mapfile` from the script since it’s a Bash 4+ feature and breaks on older versions like macOS’s Bash 3.2. Instead, I’ll read the git diff output line-by-line into an array using a `while IFS= read -r` loop. This keeps compatibility with both Bash and zsh, especially considering users might run the script under zsh or source it directly. I want to carefully handle filenames with spaces and ensure the script exits gracefully if no files are found before running eslint.

@@
-#!/usr/bin/env bash
-
-set -euo pipefail
-
-BASE_BRANCH=${1:-main}
-
-if ! git rev-parse --verify "$BASE_BRANCH" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
-  echo "Base branch '$BASE_BRANCH' not found." >&2
-  exit 1
-fi
-
-mapfile -t files < <(
-  git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACM "$BASE_BRANCH"...HEAD -- '*.js' '*.jsx' '*.ts' '*.tsx'
-)
-
-if [[ ${#files[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then
-  echo "No changed JS/TS files to lint."
-  exit 0
-fi
-
-echo "Linting ${#files[@]} changed file(s):"
-printf ' - %s\n' "${files[@]}"

+#!/usr/bin/env zsh
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+BASE_BRANCH=${1:-main}
+
+if ! git rev-parse --verify "$BASE_BRANCH" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+  echo "Base branch '$BASE_BRANCH' not found." >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+changed_files=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACM "$BASE_BRANCH"...HEAD -- '*.js' '*.jsx' '*.ts' '*.tsx')
+
+if [[ -z "$changed_files" ]]; then
+  echo "No changed JS/TS files to lint."
+  exit 0
+fi
+
+files=(${(f)changed_files})
+
+echo "Linting ${#files[@]} changed file(s):"
+printf ' - %s\n' "${files[@]}"
+
+yarn eslint "${files[@]}"
*** End Patch
PATCH
"],"workdir":"/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend"}

payload.text:
**Updating script for unstaged files**

I'm planning to adjust the lint-staged.sh script so it targets unstaged files—both modified but not staged tracked files and untracked files—by using git diff without --cached for tracked files and git ls-files for untracked. I'll combine these lists with sorting to dedupe, carefully handling empty cases, and keep the script in zsh, making sure it robustly gathers the correct files before running the lint commands.

summary.text:
**Updating script for unstaged files**

I'm planning to adjust the lint-staged.sh script so it targets unstaged files—both modified but not staged tracked files and untracked files—by using git diff without --cached for tracked files and git ls-files for untracked. I'll combine these lists with sorting to dedupe, carefully handling empty cases, and keep the script in zsh, making sure it robustly gathers the correct files before running the lint commands.

payload.name: shell
payload.arguments:
{"command":["bash","-lc","cd /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend && apply_patch <<'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: scripts/lint-staged.sh
@@
-#!/usr/bin/env zsh
-
-set -euo pipefail
-
-staged_files=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM -- '*.js' '*.jsx' '*.ts' '*.tsx')
-
-if [[ -z "$staged_files" ]]; then
-  echo "No staged JS/TS files to lint."
-  exit 0
-fi
-
-files=(${(f)staged_files})
-
-echo "Linting ${#files[@]} staged file(s):"
-printf ' - %s\n' "${files[@]}"
-
-yarn eslint "${files[@]}"
+#!/usr/bin/env zsh
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+tracked_unstaged=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACM -- '*.js' '*.jsx' '*.ts' '*.tsx')
+untracked=$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- '*.js' '*.jsx' '*.ts' '*.tsx')
+
+combined=$(printf '%s\n%s\n' "$tracked_unstaged" "$untracked" | sed '/^$/d' | sort -u)
+
+if [[ -z "$combined" ]]; then
+  echo "No unstaged JS/TS files to lint."
+  exit 0
+fi
+
+files=(${(f)combined})
+
+echo "Linting ${#files[@]} unstaged file(s):"
+printf ' - %s\n' "${files[@]}"
+
+yarn eslint "${files[@]}"
*** End Patch
PATCH
"],"workdir":"/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend"}
